pillars.title: Universal Coverage
pillars.summary: High-capacity fiber backbone and wireless mesh ensuring connectivity for all citizens and businesses.

pillars.title: Affordable Access
pillars.summary: Income-tiered pricing and subsidised device programmes so connectivity costs never block participation.

pillars.title: Digital Equity
pillars.summary: Municipal scoring and active interventions to close parity gaps across neighbourhoods and demographics.

pillars.title: Community Hubs
pillars.summary: Transformed public spaces with workstations, training rooms, and telehealth kiosks.

pillars.title: Literacy Corps
pillars.summary: Volunteer-led workshops teaching essential digital skills, online safety, and civic platform navigation.

pillars.title: Network Resilience
pillars.summary: Redundant path diversity, submarine cable landing stations, and automated failover for continuous service.

coverage.title: National Fiber Backbone
coverage.summary: High-capacity fiber backbone connecting all regional gateways with 400G uplinks and redundant path diversity.

coverage.title: Rural Last-Mile Mesh
coverage.summary: Wireless mesh and satellite backhaul bridging connectivity gaps in remote districts and island communities.

coverage.title: Community Wi-Fi Network
coverage.summary: Free municipal Wi-Fi in civic centers, transit hubs, and public health facilities with bandwidth guarantees.

coverage.title: Submarine Cable Redundancy
coverage.summary: Dual submarine cable landing stations providing inter-region redundancy.

coverage.title: 5G Small Cell Densification
coverage.summary: Urban 5G small cell deployment for high-density civic service delivery and mobile edge computing.

coverage.title: Satellite Constellation Integration
coverage.summary: Low-earth orbit satellite backup for extreme rural and maritime connectivity with automatic failover.

standards.title: Universal Service Obligation
standards.summary: Minimum 100 Mbps symmetric service guarantee for all households and small businesses within city limits.

standards.title: Affordable Access Tariff
standards.summary: Income-tiered pricing ensuring low-income households pay no more than 2% of income for baseline connectivity.

standards.title: Digital Equity Rating
standards.summary: Municipal scoring system tracking digital access parity across neighborhoods, ages, and ability groups.

standards.title: Network Reliability SLA
standards.summary: 99.9% uptime guarantee with pro-rated credits for outages exceeding 4 hours in any billing cycle.

standards.title: Open Access Infrastructure
standards.summary: Mandatory wholesale access to backbone and middle-mile infrastructure at regulated rates for all ISPs.

standards.title: Device Minimum Specification
standards.summary: Hardware baseline for subsidised devices ensuring 5-year support lifecycle and civic platform compatibility.

programs.title: Device Distribution Program
programs.summary: Subsidized device grants for low-income households, students, and seniors with setup and training support.

programs.title: Digital Literacy Corps
programs.summary: Volunteer-led workshops teaching essential digital skills, online safety, and civic platform navigation.

programs.title: Connected Community Hubs
programs.summary: Transformed public spaces into connectivity hubs with workstations, training rooms, and telehealth kiosks.

programs.title: Broadband Adoption Grant
programs.summary: Small grants to community organisations running local connectivity adoption campaigns.

programs.title: Student Connectivity Voucher
programs.summary: Annual connectivity vouchers for enrolled students ensuring home access for remote learning.

programs.title: Senior Digital Inclusion Initiative
programs.summary: Tailored device provision, in-home setup, and ongoing support for citizens 65+.

programs.title: Rural ISP Partnership Programme
programs.summary: Capital subsidies and technical support for local ISPs deploying last-mile infrastructure in underserved areas.

programs.title: Public Wi-Fi Security Hardening
programs.summary: WPA3-Enterprise, captive portal elimination, and VPN-by-default across all municipal Wi-Fi deployments.

reports.title: Annual Broadband Deployment Report 2025
reports.summary: Comprehensive coverage, speed, affordability, and adoption metrics with year-over-year comparisons.

reports.title: Digital Equity Index — Municipal Scorecards
reports.summary: Neighbourhood-level digital access scores identifying priority intervention zones for FY2026.

reports.title: Device Distribution Impact Assessment
reports.summary: Longitudinal study of device recipient outcomes: civic participation, education, employment, and health access.

reports.title: Network Resilience Stress Test Results
reports.summary: Simulated regional outage, cable cut, and DDoS scenarios with measured failover times and service continuity.
